LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT GAIL OBRIEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GAIL OBRIEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 8, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 25, 2013 AT 4:00 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 . = (302/MJM)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - GAIL O' BRIEN, TEL. NO. 659-4831, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GAIL OBRIEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/AJR)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Continued To Mar-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT GAIL OBRIEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
is continued on the Court's own motion to March 8, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of its motion to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 25, 2013 at 4:00 pm, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 . = (302/MJM)
